channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19955] sanity-benchmark test_fsx: ASSERTION( !PageDirty(lnb[i].lnb_page) ) failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/00495a02-da72-4b38-bb3d-c09aff054580

test_fsx failed with the following error:

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity-benchmark test fsx: fsx ======================== 20:26:56 \(1769459216\) 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-benchmark test fsx: fsx ======================== 20:26:56 (1769459216)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-ldiskfs.lustre-OST0000.fallocate_zero_blocks
LustreError: 29083:0:(osd_io.c:1502:osd_write_commit()) ASSERTION( !PageDirty(lnb[i].lnb_page) ) failed:
LustreError: 29083:0:(osd_io.c:1502:osd_write_commit()) LBUG
CPU: 0 UID: 0 PID: 29083 Comm: ll_ost_io00_014 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G        W  OE      ------  ---  6.12.0-124.28.1_lustre.el10.x86_64 #1 PREEMPT(voluntary)
Tainted: [W]=WARN, [O]=OOT_MODULE, [E]=UNSIGNED_MODULE
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM/RHEL, BIOS 1.16.3-2.el9_5.1 04/01/2014
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x4e/0x70
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x5/0x50 [libcfs]
 osd_write_commit+0x4e4/0xa80 [osd_ldiskfs]
 ofd_commitrw_write+0xc9c/0x1950 [ofd]
 ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
 ofd_commitrw+0x749/0xfb0 [ofd]
 obd_commitrw+0x15a/0x290 [ptlrpc]
 ? tgt_checksum_niobuf_rw+0x98/0x190 [ptlrpc]
 tgt_brw_write+0xcb3/0x1db0 [ptlrpc]
 ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
 ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
 ? libcfs_debug_msg+0x815/0xbc0 [libcfs]
 ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
 ? vsnprintf+0x257/0x700
 tgt_handle_request0.isra.0+0x124/0x810 [ptlrpc]
 ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfbef5
 tgt_request_handle+0x232/0xd50 [ptlrpc]
 ptlrpc_server_handle_request.isra.0+0x293/0xda0 [ptlrpc]
 ? lprocfs_counter_add+0x12a/0x190 [obdclass]
 ptlrpc_main+0xaeb/0xed0 [ptlrpc]
 ? __pfx_ptlrpc_main+0x10/0x10 [ptlrpc]
 kthread+0xfa/0x240
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork+0x31/0x50
 ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
 ret_from_fork_asm+0x1a/0x30
 </TASK>
Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/120905 - 6.12.0-124.28.1.el10_1.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/120905 - 6.12.0-124.28.1_lustre.el10.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-benchmark test_fsx - trevis-154vm22 crashed during sanity-benchmark test_fsx

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
sanity-flr test 70a hit the same failure on master branch:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/cd47a02e-b9cf-4bb2-9820-1ffcd0f5ca14

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/10cdbf0f-2cb9-4a37-b2bd-009425d6aed5
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/41f2476f-b39b-4c25-b265-c78b65b5f689
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/aebeae13-34af-4d5b-a58c-13891cd58758
